name: Staff of Power
description:
This staff of magically hardened wood is topped with a silver sculpture depicting magical runic symbols. When used as a weapon, a staff of power is a +2 greater striking staff.

Voluntarily destroying a staff of power unleashes an incredible blast of energy. When wielding the staff, you can Interact to break it. This releases a magical explosion centered on the staff. This deals ] damage per charge remaining in the staff (). You automatically critically fail your save. A creature reduced to 0 Hit Points by this damage dies instantly; this is a death effect.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You expend a number of charges from the staff to cast a spell from its list.

  • 1st
  • 2nd
  • 3rd
  • 4th ,
  • 5th

Craft Requirements Supply one casting of all listed levels of all listed spells.
